query: SELECT id, away_team, home_team, game_date, start_time_est, game_status, sport FROM games WHERE (away_team LIKE '%long_beach%' OR home_team LIKE '%hawaii%' OR away_team LIKE '%hawaii%' OR home_team LIKE '%long_beach%') ORDER BY game_date DESC LIMIT 10;
